allow: Bash(node -e "const X=require\('xlsx'\);const wb=X.readFile\('assets/docs/relatorios/Lista de participantes - workshop-sei-2026-04.xlsx'\);const s=wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]];const j=X.utils.sheet_to_json\(s,{header:1,defval:''}\);for\(let i=0;i<14;i++\)console.log\(i,JSON.stringify\(j[i]\)\);console.log\('---header row sample---'\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(j[8]||j[7]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./eventos-data.json'\);const insc={},pres={};for\(const e of d.eventos\){if\(e.status!=='realizado'\)continue;for\(const[k,v]of Object.entries\(e.secretarias||{}\)\)insc[k]=\(insc[k]||0\)+v;for\(const[k,v]of Object.entries\(e.secretariasPresentes||{}\)\)pres[k]=\(pres[k]||0\)+v;}const r=Object.keys\(insc\).map\(n=>{const i=insc[n],p=pres[n]||0;return{n,faltas:i-p,i,p,t:i?Math.round\(\(i-p\)/i*1000\)/10:0}}\).filter\(x=>x.faltas>0\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b.faltas-a.faltas\);r.forEach\(x=>console.log\(x.n,'→',x.faltas,'faltas \(',x.p,'/',x.i,'·',x.t+'%\)'\)\);")
